title: Dispatch Request v1
description: Workflow intake request. Producer: operator or .handoffs/ spec intake. Consumer: Hymenium (single orchestration authority). Carries the minimal fields Hymenium needs to instantiate a workflow: which handoff, which template, where to run it, scheduling priority, and any workflow dependencies.

handoff_path.description: Path to the handoff markdown file relative to workspace root (e.g., '.handoffs/hymenium/handoff-parser.md').

workflow_template.description: Workflow template ID to instantiate (e.g., 'impl-audit'). Must match a template known to Hymenium.

project_root.description: Absolute path to the workspace project root.

target_repo.description: Name of the target repository or subdirectory within project_root where changes should be made.

priority.description: Dispatch priority for scheduling and resource allocation.

depends_on.description: Workflow IDs (ULIDs) that must complete before this workflow can start. Empty array means no dependencies.

agent_tier_override.description: Override the agent tier specified in the workflow template. Omit to use the template default.
